results.name: 查看帮助
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub [options] [command]

VectaHub - Workflow Editor & Engine + OpenCLI

Options:
  -V, --version                     output the version number
  -h, --help                        display help for command

Commands:
  dev                               Development commands for multi-agent
                                    collaboration
  serve [options]                   Start VectaHub as a background service
  client                            Interact with VectaHub service
  security                          Security protocol management commands
  audit                             Audit log management commands
  tools                             CLI tools management commands
  run [options] [intent...]         Run a workflow from natural language or file
  list

results.name: dev --help
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub dev [options] [command]

Development commands for multi-agent collaboration

Options:
  -h, --help                      display help for command

Commands:
  check                           Check project configuration and dependencies
  status [options]                View project development progress
  module [options] <module-name>  Generate module template
  validate                        Validate module interface contracts
  test [options] [module-name]    Run module unit tests
  build [options]                 Build the project
  help [command]                  display help for command

results.name: tools --help
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub tools [options] [command]

CLI tools management commands

Options:
  -h, --help                        display help for command

Commands:
  list                              List all registered CLI tools
  info <toolName>                   Show tool information
  commands <toolName>               List all commands for a tool
  command <toolName> <commandName>  Show detailed command information
  test <toolName> <command>         Test if a command is dangerous
  known                             List all known tools that can be registered
  register <toolName>               Register a known tool (or all known tools
                                    with "all")
  rules [options]                   Show command rule engine status and default

results.name: tools list
results.stdout:
📦 Registered CLI Tools:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Commands: 22 | Dangerous: 5
npm                  Node package manager

docker               Containerization platform
  Commands: 12 | Dangerous: 3
curl                 Command-line tool for transferring data
  Commands: 6 | Dangerous: 0

results.name: security --help
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub security [options] [command]

Security protocol management commands

Options:
  -h, --help                   display help for command

Commands:
  list [options]               List all security rules
  add [options]                Add a new security rule
  update [options] <ruleId>    Update an existing security rule
  delete <ruleId>              Delete a security rule
  enable <ruleId>              Enable a security rule
  disable <ruleId>             Disable a security rule
  import <filePath>            Import security rules from a JSON file
  export [options] <filePath>  Export security rules to a JSON file
  test [options] <command>     Test if a command is dangerous
  reset [options]              Reset all rules to defaults
  config                       Show current

results.name: audit --help
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub audit [options] [command]

Audit log management commands

Options:
  -h, --help       display help for command

Commands:
  query [options]  Query audit logs
  stats            Show audit statistics
  help [command]   display help for command

results.name: mode --help
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub mode [options] [mode]

Get or set execution mode

Arguments:
  mode        Mode to set (strict|relaxed|consensus)

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command

results.name: generate --help
results.stdout:
Usage: vectahub generate [options] <description>

使用 LLM 生成 YAML 工作流

Arguments:
  description          工作流描述

Options:
  -o, --output <file>  输出文件路径（默认自动生成）
  -s, --save           保存到工作流库
  -e, --execute        生成后立即执行
  -h, --help           display help for command
